rootCause: Phase 1 kept count contract, but task intent and SQL provide outcome percentages through pct_within_group; count display did not represent pass/fail/withdrawal rate semantics.
fixApplied: Changed y_field to pct_within_group, y_label to % of Students, and semantic_roles.y to ratio_metric.
method: Safe registry contract change after confirming pct_within_group is a percentage-point value and sums to about 100 per group.
beforeBehavior: Stacked bar used student_count and showed count semantics.
afterBehavior: Stacked bar uses pct_within_group and visibly shows % of Students as the value axis title.
notes: API sample confirmed GP=100 and MS=100 percent totals; browser screenshot verified y-axis % of Students and tooltip values such as Fail 30.1 and Pass 69.9.

rootCause: Analytics response returned absence_data and score_series, but the visible chart only represented score_series so absence context was visually dropped.
fixApplied: Added S-T07-only absence annotation sourced from datasets.absence_data[0], showing absences and absence rate; main score chart remains unchanged.
method: Renderer-level context annotation using full datasets object; adapter still receives only selected score_series rows.
beforeBehavior: Score bar chart rendered without visible absence context.
afterBehavior: Score bar chart still renders from score_series and now shows absence context annotation nearby.
notes: Browser screenshot verified Absences 4 and Absence Rate 12.5%; chart axis labels remain Assessment Order and Normalized Score (0-100).

rootCause: Radar was discussed, but radar adapter/view is not currently supported; grouped bar is the safe supported representation.
fixApplied: No code change; regression verification only.
beforeBehavior: Grouped bar used shared BarChartView and supported grouped factor comparison.
afterBehavior: Grouped bar continues rendering normally with no radar UI.
notes: Browser screenshot verified grouped bar, legend/factor bars, Student axis title, and Lifestyle Score (1-5) axis title.

rootCause: Relationship-style metadata exists, but current output is a single-student card and lifestyle_risk_score may be null; scatter would not be reliable.
fixApplied: No code change; deferred to Phase 2B/Phase 4 as appropriate.
beforeBehavior: Card view remains safer than scatter for single-row/null composite output.
afterBehavior: Task remains card-safe; no scatter conversion.
notes: Verified no-code-change/deferred as intended. No code change in Phase 2A; intentionally deferred pending Phase 2B/Phase 3 relationship/card semantics.
